nodes.description: A critical runtime resource defining the access/permission scope granted to an agent at runtime (text truncated).

nodes.name: visibility matrix
nodes.description: A control structure (Table 3) that governs the visibility of information across different harness levels. | 可见性矩阵（Table 3），定义不同 harness 等级下代理对信息的可见范围

nodes.name: deterministic check registry
nodes.description: A registry of deterministic checks that the agent can only access below the H3 harness level. | 确定性检查注册表，仅在 H3 及以上 harness 等级才对代理开放

nodes.name: hidden evaluator notes
nodes.description: Evaluator annotations that are not visible to the agent at any harness level.

nodes.name: canonical workflow
nodes.description: The structured process used by H3 to convert task completion into a structured evidentiary object.

nodes.name: evidentiary object
nodes.description: A structured output that represents task completion evidence, produced by H3 through the canonical workflow.

nodes.name: Eight Trace Types
nodes.description: Table 4 所描述的八种 trace 类型分类体系，每种 trace 关联一种或多种运行时资源与可诊断的失败类型 | The eight categories of traces (e.g., attribution, entropy, audit, outcome record) captured within an episode package, as detailed in Table 4.

nodes.name: Five-label Final-Outcome Taxonomy
nodes.description: 对 verification report 进行分类的五标签最终结果分类法

nodes.name: Patch
nodes.description: 验证报告的组成部分之一，与 trace 一起作为分类依据

nodes.name: Test-time Compute
nodes.description: Tool trace 所捕获的运行时资源，表示测试阶段计算开销

nodes.name: Runtime Resource
nodes.description: trace 类型所关联的运行时资源类别，包括 tool budget、test-time compute、context budget、project memory 等

nodes.name: Failure Type
nodes.description: trace 类型所诊断的失败类型，包括 overall episode coherence、tool 失败、context 失败等

nodes.name: Harness Engineering
nodes.description: 作为关键词提出的研究方向，关注如何约束和引导基础模型驱动的智能体产生可验证、可归属且可维护的变更。 | 一门围绕执行日志、失败归因、确定性需求校验与结构化验证报告构建运行时系统的学科，用于支撑基础模型软件代理的可验证、可归因、可维护变更。

nodes.name: Foundation Models
nodes.description: 快速演变为编程助手的基础模型，可生成函数、修改文件、解释代码、编写测试并调用工具。 | Large pre-trained models that have transformed automated code generation, serving as the base for software-engineering agents.

nodes.name: Autonomous Software Engineering
nodes.description: 由基础模型驱动的自主软件工程任务，涵盖代码生成、文件修改与工具调用等能力。 | The domain that is reframed by the framework, ladder, and protocol, focusing on verifiable attributed maintainable change rather than patch generation. | 该框架所重新定义的核心问题域，从'模型能否产出补丁'转向'模型—harness—环境系统能否产出可验证变更'。 | 运行时视角下的自主软件工程，区别于单纯的代码生成能力，涵盖有状态、端到端的软件工程过程。

nodes.name: Runtime Systems
nodes.description: 面向基础模型软件智能体的运行时系统，是其执行复杂工程任务所需的基础设施，被视为需要重点研究的方向。

nodes.name: Agent Evaluation
nodes.description: 针对自主软件工程智能体的评估方法与技术，用于衡量智能体的能力与产出质量。

nodes.name: Software-Engineering Agents
nodes.description: 基于基础模型构建的软件工程智能体，能够自主生成函数、修改文件、解释代码、编写测试并调用工具。 | Autonomous agents powered by foundation models that perform software engineering tasks; noted as unreliable in realistic development settings.

nodes.name: Verification trace
nodes.description: 记录尝试的验证类型（错误复现、确定性行为检查、注册测试、定向测试、完整回归、lint、补丁审查、手动评估等） | 验证协议的输出记录，提供确定性证据以判定任务是否真正完成 | 验证追踪类型，承载验证证据（verification evidence）。

nodes.name: Project memory artifacts
nodes.description: 上下文追踪中查阅的项目记忆制品，为代理决策提供上下文信息

nodes.name: Verification Checks
nodes.description: An evaluator's adjudication mechanism relying on three deterministic behavioral checks: empty-password probe, valid-login probe, and invalid-non-empty-credentials probe.

nodes.name: Empty-Password Probe
nodes.description: A deterministic behavioral check that probes the login controller by submitting an empty password and expects a specific substring response. | A probe that invokes the login controller with username 'alice' and an empty password, expecting the substring 'Password is required.'

nodes.name: Valid-Login Probe
nodes.description: A deterministic behavioral check that probes the login controller with valid credentials and expects a specific substring response. | A probe that invokes the login controller with password 'correct-password' and expects a valid-login substring in the output.

nodes.name: Invalid-Non-Empty-Credentials Probe
nodes.description: A deterministic behavioral check that probes the login controller with invalid but non-empty credentials and expects a specific substring response.

nodes.name: Login Controller
nodes.description: The component invoked directly by the verification probes to return a specific substring response. | The login controller module that is invoked with test inputs to validate authentication behavior and produces JSON responses. | The controller under test, invoked directly by the deterministic behavioral checks with username/password inputs to verify output substrings.

nodes.name: Reproduction Log
nodes.description: An explicitly recorded artifact used in the verification process.

nodes.name: Failure Attribution Log
nodes.description: An explicitly recorded artifact used in the verification process.

nodes.name: Deterministic Requirement Checks
nodes.description: Checks explicitly recorded in the verification process.

nodes.name: Structured Verification Report
nodes.description: The artifact in which reproduction logs, failure attribution logs, deterministic requirement checks, and verification checks are explicitly recorded.

nodes.name: Targeted Login Tests
nodes.description: Login-specific tests recorded during verification when available. | Specific test probes (e.g., for 'Invalid credentials.' substring) executed via Node.js against the login controller.

nodes.name: Lint
nodes.description: Code style/static analysis checks recorded during verification when available. | Static analysis / linting check modality within the protocol, used for lightweight code quality verification. | Code linting checks executed during outcome adjudication. | Static code/style checking applied by the outcome adjudication process.

nodes.name: Full Regression
nodes.description: A comprehensive regression test suite recorded during verification when available. | Comprehensive test suite execution modality within the protocol, used to catch broader regressions.

nodes.name: Evaluator
nodes.description: The entity responsible for adjudicating based on verification checks, producing a structured verification report. | The entity responsible for applying adjudication checks across all hierarchy levels to every episode.

nodes.name: Local Code Generation
nodes.description: The capability of writing correct code patches for specific functions or files in isolation

nodes.name: Software Task Completion
nodes.description: The capability of completing full end-to-end software engineering tasks, including understanding context, applying correct changes, and verifying success

nodes.name: Task Verification
nodes.description: The process of confirming whether a software task has been successfully completed through testing and validation

nodes.name: arXiv:2403.16971
nodes.description: 2024年arXiv预印本论文，内容涉及操作系统相关主题（切片开头被截断）

nodes.name: OpenAI Codex
nodes.description: OpenAI发布的以Agent为先的软件开发系统，源于其2026年工程报告 | OpenAI 发布的编码代理产品，被作为业界 harness 类结构的代表案例进行讨论。

nodes.name: Microsoft Agent Harnesses
nodes.description: Microsoft为开发者工具构建的Agent Harness框架，发表于2026年Microsoft工程博客

nodes.name: AgentFM
nodes.description: 由Xiao Liu、Hao Yu、Hanchen Zhang、Yifan Xu、Minlie Huang、Yu Su等作者联合发表的大模型Agent相关论文（参考文献[16]，标题被截断）

nodes.name: Xiao Liu
nodes.description: AgentFM论文（参考文献[16]）的第一作者

nodes.name: Minlie Huang
nodes.description: AgentFM论文（参考文献[16]）的署名作者之一

nodes.name: Yu Su
nodes.description: AgentFM论文（参考文献[16]）的署名作者之一

nodes.name: Huan Sun
nodes.description: AgentFM论文（参考文献[16]）的署名作者之一

nodes.name: Tianjun Zhang
nodes.description: AgentFM论文（参考文献[16]）的署名作者之一

nodes.name: H0-H3 Capability Ladder
nodes.description: A progressive evaluation ladder with four levels (H0–H3) that measures agent capabilities by incrementally adding infrastructure components.

nodes.name: Task description
nodes.description: Foundational component present at H0; provides the task definition to the agent. | An artifact visible at all levels H0–H3 of the ladder.

nodes.name: Repository files
nodes.description: Foundational component present at H0; grants access to the code repository. | An artifact visible at all levels H0–H3 of the ladder.

nodes.name: Test-command registry
nodes.description: Introduced at H1; catalogs the test commands the agent may invoke. | 测试命令注册表，H1 引入的组件，使测试调用可被追踪和复用。 | An artifact visible from H1 upward (hidden at H0). | H1 中引入的测试命令注册表，用于记录可用于验证的命令集合。

nodes.name: Tool-usage protocol
nodes.description: Introduced at H1; specifies the conventions for invoking tools. | 工具使用协议，H1 引入的行为规范组件，规范 Agent 对工具的调用方式。 | An artifact visible from H1 upward (hidden at H0). | H1 中规定的工具调用与使用规范协议。

nodes.name: AGENT_GUIDE
nodes.description: Introduced at H2; a documentation file guiding the agent's high-level behavior. | An artifact visible only at H2 and H3 levels of the ladder.

nodes.name: ARCHITECTURE
nodes.description: Introduced at H2; a document describing the codebase architecture. | An artifact visible only at H2 and H3 levels of the ladder.

nodes.name: TESTING guide
nodes.description: Introduced at H2; documentation describing testing practices. | An artifact visible only at H2 and H3 levels of the ladder.

nodes.name: TASK_STATE
nodes.description: Introduced at H2; tracks the persistent state of an in-progress task.

nodes.name: KNOWN_FAILURES
nodes.description: Introduced at H2; catalog of previously observed failures to avoid.

nodes.name: Context-selection protocol
nodes.description: Introduced at H2; rules for selecting which repository context to surface. | H2 中用于选择合适上下文以送入模型的协议。

nodes.name: Deterministic check registry
nodes.description: Introduced at H3; registry of deterministic correctness checks.

nodes.name: Bug-reproduction protocol
nodes.description: Introduced at H3; protocol for reliably reproducing reported bugs. | H0–H3 ladder 中用于复现 Bug 的协议组件。 | A protocol included in the H3 harness for reproducing bugs in a controlled manner.

nodes.name: Failure-attribution protocol
nodes.description: Introduced at H3; protocol for attributing failures to their root cause. | H0–H3 ladder 中用于对失败进行归因分析的协议组件。 | A protocol included in the H3 harness for attributing failures to their root causes.

nodes.name: Verification report template
nodes.description: Introduced at H3; standardized template used to record verification results. | H0–H3 ladder 中用于规范化验证报告输出的模板组件。 | A template included in the H3 harness for producing standardized verification reports.

nodes.name: Hidden evaluator notes
nodes.description: Reserved for hidden evaluator notes; not present at any visible level (all dashes). | H0–H3 ladder 中评估者使用的隐藏评估备注组件。 | 隐藏的评估者注释，在任何 harness 等级下对代理均不可见

nodes.name: patch_taxonomy
nodes.description: Classification taxonomy for patches that explicitly distinguishes task behavior from evidence quality.

nodes.name: task_behavior
nodes.description: Dimension of the patch taxonomy describing how a patch executes or behaves on the target task.

nodes.name: evidence_quality
nodes.description: Dimension of the patch taxonomy describing the quality of evidence used to verify patch correctness.

nodes.name: full_regression
nodes.description: Regression testing process attempted under a strict timeout; failures or timeouts are explicitly recorded rather than silently retried or treated as success.

nodes.name: Agent Compute Environment
nodes.description: An isolated workspace setup where each episode executes with a repository checked out at a fixed initial commit, running tool invocations and test commands in subprocesses with explicit timeouts.

nodes.name: Agent Harness
nodes.description: The evaluation harness layer controlling compute environment artifacts across different harness levels for agent task execution. | 面向编码代理的 harness 结构，包含上下文管理、仓库知识、可观测性等模块。 | A framework that operationalizes runtime support for agents through tool access, project memory, task state, observability, failure attribution, verification, permissions, entropy auditing, and intervention recording. | Microsoft 提出的构建智能体执行环境（harness）的相关工程实践与技术。 | A harness system that records how the agent selects context, invokes tools, attempts verification, recovers from failure, and incurs intervention, enforcing rigorous evaluation principles.

nodes.name: GPT-4 Technical Report
nodes.description: Referenced as reference [1] in the document, authored by Mark Chen, Jerry Tworek, Heewoo Jun, Qiming Yuan, Henrique Ponde de Oliveira Pinto, Jared Kaplan, Harri Edwards, et al.

nodes.name: Operating systems
nodes.description: 传统操作系统，作为智能体优先开发运行时系统的设计类比对象

nodes.name: Foundation-model agents
nodes.description: 基于基础模型驱动的智能体，是智能体优先开发运行时系统的服务对象

nodes.name: Autonomous software engineering
nodes.description: 自主软件工程领域，依赖专门的智能体运行时系统来实现

nodes.name: Agent-first development
nodes.description: 以智能体为核心的软件开发范式，强调仓库制品和架构图格式等智能体相关工件设计

nodes.name: Architecture-map format
nodes.description: 仓库制品中的一种架构映射格式，旨在防止在错误的层级进行修复

nodes.name: Long-horizon evaluation
nodes.description: 一种通过在每个 harness 层级下运行任务序列、在任务间保留仓库状态、并在每回合后审计熵来评估的方法，用以衡量先前回合对后续成功的影响以及更丰富的 harness 是否能降低长期维护负担。 | 一种评估方法，跨同一代码仓库运行一系列任务，保留仓库状态，审计熵并度量各harness水平的表现。

nodes.name: Repository state preservation
nodes.description: 在长程评估中，于任务之间持久化仓库状态的技术要求，是衡量 harness 有效性的关键因素。

nodes.name: Entropy auditing
nodes.description: 在每个回合（episode）之后进行的熵审查，用于追踪和度量系统状态的混乱程度变化。

nodes.name: Agent-readable affordances
nodes.description: 仓库中可被 agent 直接读取和利用的功能性元素（如文档结构），是 AI-native repository design 的核心考量。

nodes.name: Documentation structure
nodes.description: 仓库中的文档组织形式，被提出作为 AI-native repository design 的研究方向之一。

nodes.name: Long-term maintenance burden
nodes.description: 随时间累积的仓库维护成本，是 long-horizon evaluation 试图通过 harness 优化来降低的目标指标。

nodes.name: Agent Frameworks
nodes.description: 智能体开发框架，作为构建AI Development Harness的组成元素之一。 | A related research area (referenced as [11, 12]) from which AI Harness Engineering is distinguished. | Software frameworks that can be used as building blocks to construct an AI Development Harness.

nodes.name: ACIs
nodes.description: Agent-Computer Interfaces（智能体-计算机接口），作为构建AI Development Harness的组成元素之一。 | Agent-Computer Interfaces; core components that can be used to build the harness runtime interface.

nodes.name: DevOps Tools
nodes.description: DevOps工具，作为构建AI Development Harness的组成元素之一。

nodes.name: Prompts
nodes.description: 提示信息，作为构建AI Development Harness的组成元素之一。 | Prompting constructs that can be used as building blocks for constructing an AI Development Harness.

nodes.name: Runtime Contract
nodes.description: AI Development Harness中每个组件的运行时契约规范。

nodes.name: Evidence Artifact
nodes.description: AI Development Harness中每个组件产生的证据产物。

nodes.name: agent operating system
nodes.description: 面向通用智能体调度和资源管理的操作系统，与开发型 harness 形成对比 | 智能体操作系统，面向通用的智能体调度与资源管理；与 harness 的关注点不同。

nodes.name: evaluation harness
nodes.description: 用于测量智能体行为的评估环境，与塑造行为的开发型 harness 形成对比

nodes.name: platform engineering
nodes.description: 为人类与机器开发工作流提供基础设施的实践，被明确区别于智能体开发 harness

nodes.name: Validation Tasks
nodes.description: Tasks structured as short commands with expected output substrings, used to exercise corrected behavior as well as preserved valid and invalid input behaviors. | 用于压力测试验证协议（Verification Protocol）的任务类别

nodes.name: Harness Artifacts
nodes.description: Agent-visible verification artifacts at H3 that support the agent's own verification process. | Auxiliary artifacts included as part of the input pack alongside the task and repository.

nodes.name: Evaluator-side Adjudication
nodes.description: Checks applied at all levels of the hierarchy to classify the final outcome of an agent's execution.

nodes.name: Behavior Ladder
nodes.description: A hierarchical structure of behavior levels (including H3) that the dual-role distinction of deterministic checks aims to preserve.

nodes.name: Agent Verification
nodes.description: Self-verification process performed by the agent using agent-visible harness artifacts at H3.

nodes.name: Expected Output Substring
nodes.description: A target string fragment used as a success criterion in validation tasks to classify outcomes.

nodes.name: Episode
nodes.description: 一次由 model–harness–environment 系统尝试完成指定软件工程任务的执行过程，由 episode identifier、模型/智能体身份、harness level、仓库、初始 commit、任务规范、可见产物与允许使用的工具等共同定义。 | An evaluation unit defined by episode identifier, model/agent identity, harness level, repository, initial commit, task specification, visible artifacts, allowed tools, intervention policy, verification procedure, and final outcome rule. | A single evaluation instance/attempt to which the evaluator applies all outcome adjudication checks.

nodes.name: Protocol
nodes.description: 记录智能体最终结果与中间证据的评测协议，负责选择上下文、调用工具、解读失败、验证行为并规避维护负担。 | One of the three pillars (framework, ladder, protocol) that together support reframing autonomous software engineering. | Referenced communication or execution protocol that distinguishes between deterministic [behavior] (truncated in context). | 生成 episode packages 的协议，用于支撑群体层面的分析

nodes.name: model–harness–environment system
nodes.description: 由模型、harness 与运行环境三部分构成的系统，是执行 Episode 的主体。 | The unit of analysis adopted by the paper, comprising the model, the harness, and the environment, with the harness acting as the mediating substrate.

nodes.name: Harness level
nodes.description: Episode 定义中的一个关键属性，标识 harness 所提供的工具与上下文能力层级。 | 评测/测试的 harness 级别，是影响证据质量的关键因素 | 评估中使用的harness（脚手架/控制器）层级，用于在不同条件下对比任务表现。

nodes.name: software-engineering task
nodes.description: Episode 所要完成的指定任务类型，属于软件工程领域。

nodes.name: password validation
nodes.description: 验证密码是否合法的逻辑，当前对空密码未作为验证错误处理

nodes.name: validation error
nodes.description: 输入校验阶段产生的错误，期望对空密码产生包含 'Password is required.' 的验证错误

nodes.name: Invalid credentials
nodes.description: 凭证不匹配时由 credential matching 报告的错误信息

nodes.name: Password is required
nodes.description: 期望在空密码场景下返回的验证错误提示信息

nodes.name: Four-level ladder (H0–H3)
nodes.description: 一个四层递进式评估框架，通过逐步向智能体暴露运行时支持来控制实验变量，层级为 H0、H1、H2、H3。

nodes.name: H0 (Minimal baseline)
nodes.description: 四层梯的最底层基线，智能体仅接收任务描述和仓库文件，无工具注册表、项目记忆或验证协议，作为其他层级的对照基准。

nodes.name: H1 (Tool harness)
nodes.description: 四层梯的第二层，在 H0 基础上增加工具注册表、测试命令等工具支持。 | 工具层 Harness，由 H0 加上工具注册表、测试命令注册表与工具使用协议构成，使动作面显式且可追溯，但不提供 agent 可读的项目知识或验证纪律。

nodes.name: Runtime support
nodes.description: 运行时支持，指在智能体执行任务过程中所提供的外部辅助能力（如工具、记忆、验证机制）。

nodes.name: Software Agent
nodes.description: 基于基础模型驱动的自主软件工程代理，依赖模型—harness—环境协同系统产出正确变更。

nodes.name: Runtime System
nodes.description: 框架提出的研究对象：为基础模型软件代理提供执行、监控与验证能力的运行时支撑系统。

nodes.name: Deterministic Requirement Check
nodes.description: Harness Engineering 中的验证手段，通过确定性规则对软件代理的产出进行可重复校验。

nodes.name: traditional operating systems
nodes.description: Systems that manage CPU, memory, files, processes, and devices; used as the reference point for the resource-management view of development harnesses.

nodes.name: resource-management view
nodes.description: An analytical perspective that frames development harnesses by analogy to traditional operating systems, focusing on the runtime resources they manage.

nodes.name: agent-on-repository system
nodes.description: A class of agent systems that operate against repositories and must implicitly make eleven runtime decisions whether or not the harness exposes them.

nodes.name: harness ladder
nodes.description: 在自主软件工程评估中定义对智能体可见内容的分层结构，决定智能体能感知到的环境范围。 | 框架内的一个受控消融（controlled-ablation）工具/仪器。

nodes.name: evaluation protocol
nodes.description: 定义智能体每次运行如何被记录、验证、审计和分类的评估流程规范。 | A protocol that converts each agent run into an auditable episode package, providing structured evidence for autonomous software engineering agents.

nodes.name: evidence-based evaluation
nodes.description: 不仅衡量是否产出补丁，还衡量模型-工具链-环境系统是否产出可审计证据以证明任务要求被满足的评估原则。

nodes.name: conventional benchmark
nodes.description: 仅报告最终补丁是否通过测试的传统基准评估方式。

nodes.name: autonomous software-engineering evaluation
nodes.description: 针对自主软件工程任务的评估领域，关注补丁产出与可审计证据两个维度。

nodes.name: Model Context Protocol
nodes.description: 由 Anthropic 提出的模型上下文协议，用于在 LLM 应用中标准化上下文信息的传递。 | Anthropic 于 2024 年提出的模型上下文协议，用于在 LLM 应用中标准化上下文信息的传递。

nodes.name: Anthropic
nodes.description: AI 公司，Model Context Protocol 的提出者与发布方。 | 提出 Model Context Protocol（MCP）的 AI 公司。

nodes.name: COLM
nodes.description: Conference on Language Modeling，语言建模学术会议。 | Conference on Language Modeling，AutoGen 论文发表的学术会议（2024）。

nodes.name: Trace-based evaluation
nodes.description: 一种基于执行轨迹的评估范式，将代理运行过程中的各项度量形式化为一组可记录、可验证、可审计、可分类的协议。

nodes.name: Harness ladder
nodes.description: 定义了代理（agent）在运行过程中对其可见范围的阶梯式模型，决定了代理能看到哪些工具与上下文。

nodes.name: Evaluation protocol
nodes.description: 规定每次代理运行如何被记录、验证、审计与分类的协议，是 trace-based evaluation 的核心组成。

nodes.name: Foundation models
nodes.description: Large pre-trained models that have rapidly become capable programming assistants, able to generate functions, modify files, explain code, write tests, invoke tools, and interact with software repositories.

nodes.name: Software-engineering agents
nodes.description: Autonomous agents that take a high-level development task and carry it through implementation, testing, and verification — an ambition recently made plausible by advances in foundation models.

nodes.name: Tool budget
nodes.description: Constraint defining which actions an agent can take and when; missing it leads to inability to inspect, test, or modify.

nodes.name: Verification evidence
nodes.description: Proof that requirements are satisfied; missing it causes premature success claims.

nodes.name: Validator
nodes.description: 用于拒绝空字符串或仅包含空白字符密码的输入校验器

nodes.name: Test
nodes.description: 覆盖 Validator 修正后行为的测试用例

nodes.name: Regression
nodes.description: 受超时约束的完整回归测试尝试，并记录其结果

nodes.name: Verification report
nodes.description: 将每个需求链接到其证据的验证报告，作为 episode 的最终产物

nodes.name: Evidence quality
nodes.description: 证据质量，系统性地随 harness level 变化而变化

nodes.name: action trace
nodes.description: A trace type that records externally meaningful operations in the runtime.

nodes.name: intervention log
nodes.description: One of eight trace types used to record human intervention events. | 记录人工辅助、其可避免性、负担等级以及对应 harness 缺口的日志机制

nodes.name: entropy audit
nodes.description: A trace type that audits entropy consumption during execution. | 记录智能体引入的维护负担类别（代码、文档、依赖、测试、文件残留、架构、工作流）及 0–3 严重程度的审计机制

nodes.name: entropy budget
nodes.description: A trace type representing the allocated entropy budget for runtime behavior. | 类比资源管理中的熵预算概念，用于度量 Agent 行为的不确定度。 | 用于控制输出多样性或随机性的熵资源配额。

nodes.name: outcome record
nodes.description: A trace type capturing the final classification outcome. | 记录最终分类的结果记录机制

nodes.name: overall adjudication
nodes.description: A trace type representing the top-level adjudication result.

nodes.name: runtime resource
nodes.description: The runtime artifact or signal that each trace type captures (as mapped in Table 4).

nodes.name: failure type
nodes.description: The class of failure that each trace type is designed to address (as mapped in Table 4).

nodes.name: compact schema
nodes.description: The condensed JSONL schema admitted by each trace.

nodes.name: Table 4
nodes.description: A reference table that maps each trace type to its runtime resource and the failure type it addresses.

nodes.name: verification report
nodes.description: An accompanying artifact in the trace bundle used for verification.

nodes.name: final report
nodes.description: An accompanying artifact in the trace bundle providing a final summary.

nodes.name: final-outcome record
nodes.description: An accompanying artifact in the trace bundle capturing the final outcome.

nodes.name: patch
nodes.description: An accompanying artifact in the trace bundle used for remediation or adjustment. | 代理在任务执行过程中生成或修改的代码补丁，是验证评估的对象之一。 | 被验证的代码修改对象，其正确性与诊断价值可在分类法中独立评估。 | 智能体在任务中产出的代码修改，是评估任务行为的核心产物之一。

nodes.name: Microsoft Agent Harness
nodes.description: 微软提出的代理 harness 框架，描述了上下文管理、代码库知识、可观测性等能力。

nodes.name: Coding Agent
nodes.description: 工业界正在围绕其构建 harness 类结构的编码代理类型。

nodes.name: Repository Knowledge
nodes.description: Harness 结构中的关键模块，用于注入仓库级知识。

nodes.name: Failure Attributions
nodes.description: 最高级别 harness 提供的失败归因信息。

nodes.name: Structured Verification Reports
nodes.description: 最高级别 harness 产出的结构化验证报告，较低级别不产生此类报告。

nodes.name: agent evaluation
nodes.description: The process of evaluating agent behavior, conventionally treating human help as disallowed or noise

nodes.name: diagnostic signal
nodes.description: A new approach that treats human help during agent episodes as a diagnostic signal to identify missing or inadequate agent capabilities

nodes.name: context manager
nodes.description: Component responsible for managing what context or files the agent inspects; its inadequacy is signaled when humans must direct the agent to specific files

nodes.name: observability
nodes.description: Capability to observe agent internals and test failures; its absence is indicated when humans must interpret test failures

nodes.name: failure-attribution support
nodes.description: Support for attributing test failures to causes; its absence is indicated when humans interpret failures for the agent

nodes.name: verification protocol
nodes.description: Protocol for verifying the agent's final behavior; its absence is indicated when humans must verify behavior | Protocol introduced at H3 governing how agent outputs are verified.

nodes.name: human help
nodes.description: Human intervention during an agent evaluation episode, repurposed from noise/nuisance to a diagnostic signal

nodes.name: framework
nodes.description: 一个用于支持智能体在软件仓库上可靠工作的框架，它开启了一个经验性研究项目，而非终结某个研究。 | An unnamed evaluation framework for autonomous software engineering that applies the evaluation protocol to controlled validation tasks and yields episode packages.

nodes.name: protocol
nodes.description: 框架内的一组规程，能够产出可供群体层面分析使用的 episode packages。 | 区分任务行为与证据质量的整体方法学框架，依靠确定性行为检查完成验证。 | An evaluation protocol that records both final outcomes and intermediate evidence to study agent harnesses, going beyond whether a final patch passes tests. | 评估协议，定义了智能体产出证据需满足的规范要求。

nodes.name: population-level analysis
nodes.description: 在群体/统计层面对 episode packages 进行分析的方法。

nodes.name: software repository
nodes.description: 被框架重新设计/暴露的对象，其设计目标从'供人类开发者使用'转向'供智能体可靠操作'。

nodes.name: verification report templates
nodes.description: 框架为智能体暴露的模板资源之一，用于验证报告。

nodes.name: entropy dashboards
nodes.description: 框架为智能体暴露的仪表板资源之一，用于熵/不确定性可视化。

nodes.name: permission manifests
nodes.description: 框架为智能体暴露的资源之一，用于声明/管理权限。

nodes.name: intervention logs
nodes.description: 框架为智能体暴露的日志资源之一，用于记录干预行为。

nodes.name: H3 protocol
nodes.description: A verification protocol/discipline that provides structured verification, defining what 'verified' means across hierarchy levels.

nodes.name: evaluator-side deterministic checks
nodes.description: A verification method used at the H0 level whose passing is a hallmark of autonomous_verified_success.

nodes.name: full regression
nodes.description: A regression testing methodology that fully succeeds at H0 but records a timeout at H1. | 完整回归测试，在评估中作为可用的测试信号被记录

nodes.name: tool trace
nodes.description: A distinctive evidence artifact produced at H1 and H2 levels.

nodes.name: targeted login test
nodes.description: A targeted test artifact produced as evidence at H1 and H2 levels.

nodes.name: lint
nodes.description: A static analysis/lint artifact produced as evidence at H1 and H2 levels. | 代码静态检查，作为评估代理表现的一种测试手段

nodes.name: Ofir Press
nodes.description: 同时参与 SWE-bench 与 SWE-agent 两篇论文的核心作者。

nodes.name: Karthik Narasimhan
nodes.description: 同时参与 SWE-bench 与 SWE-agent 两篇论文的核心作者。 | Co-author of Reflexion paper

nodes.name: Shunyu Yao
nodes.description: SWE-agent 论文的合作作者。 | Co-author of Reflexion paper | Researcher and co-author of the Reflexion paper on language agents with verbal reinforcement learning.

nodes.name: Kexin Pei
nodes.description: SWE-bench 论文的合作作者。

nodes.name: A VSR
nodes.description: A quantitative metric defined in the evaluation protocol, likely an adjusted version of VSR

nodes.name: tool recovery
nodes.description: A quantitative metric measuring the ability to recover from tool errors or failures

nodes.name: models × harness levels × tasks design
nodes.description: A factorial experimental design separating model effects from harness effects to reveal model-agnostic vs model-dependent harness components

nodes.name: arXiv:2404.05427
nodes.description: An arXiv preprint from 2024, referenced in the bibliography

nodes.name: Reflexion
nodes.description: Reflexion: Language agents with verbal reinforcement learning, by Shinn et al., NeurIPS 2023 | Language agents framework that uses verbal reinforcement learning to enable self-reflection and iterative improvement.

nodes.name: Chain-of-thought prompting
nodes.description: Chain-of-thought prompting elicits reasoning in large language models, by Wei et al.

nodes.name: Noah Shinn
nodes.description: Author of Reflexion paper

nodes.name: Federico Cassano
nodes.description: Co-author of Reflexion paper

nodes.description: Co-author of Reflexion paper

nodes.description: Co-author of Reflexion paper

nodes.description: First author of Chain-of-thought prompting paper

nodes.description: Co-author of Chain-of-thought prompting paper

nodes.description: Co-author of Chain-of-thought prompting paper

nodes.description: Co-author of Chain-of-thought prompting paper

nodes.description: Co-author of Chain-of-thought prompting paper

nodes.description: Co-author of Chain-of-thought prompting paper

nodes.description: Co-author of Chain-of-thought prompting paper

nodes.name: Denny Zhou
nodes.description: Co-author of Chain-of-thought prompting paper

nodes.name: Agent Diagnostic Framework
nodes.description: 由验证追踪、失败归因日志和干预日志等组件构成的智能体诊断与审计框架体系。

nodes.name: Patch+Verification Report
nodes.description: A component within the episode package comprising the generated patch together with its verification report.

nodes.name: Controlled visibility
nodes.description: Requirement R1: each level exposes only the artifacts assigned to that level; lower levels do not see higher-level artifacts.

nodes.name: Same task same repository same initial state
nodes.description: Requirement R2: all levels run from the same task and the same repository state.

nodes.name: Traceable runtime support
nodes.description: Requirement R3: when a level provides a capability, its use is recorded.

nodes.name: No hidden evaluator leakage
nodes.description: Requirement R4: expected files, expected fixes, and evaluator notes are not visible to the agent at any level.

nodes.name: Multi-level evaluation framework
nodes.description: Inferred framework that defines hierarchical levels with controlled artifact visibility, runtime support traceability, and isolation of evaluator internals from agents.

nodes.name: permission boundary
nodes.description: 类比操作系统中权限边界的资源管理维度，用于约束 Agent 的行为范围。 | A core harness facet stressed by permission-sensitive tasks to enforce correct permission boundaries.

nodes.name: failure signal
nodes.description: 类比操作系统中的失败信号机制，用于反映 Agent 运行过程中的异常状态。 | 指示智能体行为或输出失败的可观测信号。

nodes.name: test-time compute
nodes.description: 测试时计算资源，作为 Agent 需要被管理的关键资源维度之一。 | 测试阶段投入的计算资源量。

nodes.name: agent behavioral coherence
nodes.description: Agent 行为的一致性，是该资源管理类比试图保障的核心目标之一。

nodes.name: task-runtime infrastructure
nodes.description: harness 的第二项属性，作为任务级运行时基础设施，决定 Agent 如何 observe、act、receive feedback 以及 establish completion。

nodes.name: evaluability
nodes.description: harness 的第三项属性，harness 的组件可被暴露、隐藏、消融、追踪和对比，因而具有可评估性。

nodes.name: evidence production
nodes.description: harness 的第四项属性，harness 可产出证据，包括为何选择某文件、使用了哪些工具、失败如何归因、哪些需求被验证等。

nodes.name: Attribution before recovery
nodes.description: 原则 P4：在 agent 再次编辑之前，失败的观察会产生分类诊断（classified diagnosis），先归因再修复。

nodes.name: Maintenance and entropy awareness
nodes.description: 原则 P5：harness 会记录 agent 是否引入了维护负担（陈旧文档、依赖变动、生成残留、测试弱化、边界违反），而不是将其视为环路之外的问题。

nodes.name: Classified diagnosis
nodes.description: 在 Attribution before recovery 原则下，对失败观察所产生的结构化、可分类的诊断结果，作为恢复前归因的依据。

nodes.name: Eleven Component Responsibilities
nodes.description: Table 1 中列出的 development harness 的 11 项组件职责，定义了该 harness 的内部结构与责任划分。

nodes.name: credentials probe
nodes.description: 一种测试探针，用于直接调用登录控制器并验证返回特定子字符串

nodes.name: login controller
nodes.description: 登录功能的控制器组件，被 credentials probe 直接调用

nodes.name: Targeted login tests
nodes.description: 针对性登录测试，与 credentials probe 等探针共同记录在评估结果中

nodes.name: Harness setup
nodes.description: 评估 harness 的设置方式，规定同一任务与同一初始仓库状态在所有四个 harness 等级下被评估

nodes.name: Auditability
nodes.description: The property allowing an evaluator to inspect whether an agent's diagnosis was reasonable before scrutinizing the patch.

nodes.name: Tool Stability
nodes.description: The challenge of ensuring commands and tests are reliable in agent execution harnesses. | The concept of treating the stability/instability of tools as an analyzable runtime resource rather than an incidental engineering nuisance. | 自主智能体在真实环境中运行时所面临的工具稳定性问题，本质上属于 harness 问题。

nodes.name: Harness Problem
nodes.description: The category of problems related to tool stability, including commands hanging, flaky tests, and expensive or unstable regression suites.

nodes.name: Autonomous Agents
nodes.description: Software agents that act in real environments and must adapt to harness instability. | Agents capable of autonomous engineering who must adapt to tool failures like human developers do. | 在真实环境中行动、需要面对工具稳定性与编辑可靠性挑战的自主智能体。 | Agents that take on sustained software development work, for which entropy management is predicted to become increasingly important.

nodes.name: Human Developers
nodes.description: Reference group that adapts to environmental uncertainty by choosing targeted tests, adding timeouts, inspecting logs, or reporting uncertainty.

nodes.name: Regression Suites
nodes.description: Full sets of tests that can be expensive or unstable in autonomous agent workflows.

nodes.name: Targeted Tests
nodes.description: Selective tests chosen by human developers to cope with unstable or expensive full test runs. | A narrow-scope testing modality within the protocol, chosen by developers/agents to probe specific behaviors.

nodes.name: Timeouts
nodes.description: Mechanism used by human developers (and required by agents) to prevent commands from hanging.

nodes.name: autonomy gap
nodes.description: 定义为模型表观本地编码能力与完整系统在无需运行时人工替代帮助情况下执行软件任务能力之间的差距，是一类而非单一失败模式（如写对逻辑但检错文件、选对测试但误解输出、打补丁到错误层等）。 | The defined difference between a model's apparent local coding ability and its complete system performance when situated in the harness/environment.

nodes.name: harness–environment system
nodes.description: 由 harness 作为中介底层（mediating substrate）的 harness–environment 系统结构，是讨论自主性差距的运行时载体。

nodes.name: Adaptive Testing Protocol
nodes.description: Protocol that distinguishes between deterministic behavioral checks, targeted tests, full regression attempts, and lint, recording each with its outcome and instability.

nodes.name: Deterministic Behavioral Checks
nodes.description: One category of verification in the protocol, focusing on deterministic behavior validation. | A set of three behavioral checks that exercise the login controller directly with predetermined input cases to validate deterministic outputs. | A set of three deterministic checks that exercise the structured contribution field.

nodes.name: Entropy
nodes.description: Uncertainty and instability inherent in autonomous engineering; acknowledged as a first-class consideration. | 任务状态在多episode过程中累积的不确定性或信息量，用以衡量项目记忆随时间的演化。

nodes.name: Developer Adaptation
nodes.description: Human developer behaviors when facing tool failures: choosing targeted tests, adding timeouts, inspecting logs, or reporting uncertainty.

nodes.name: validator
nodes.description: 校验器组件，被修改以拒绝空字符串或仅包含空白字符的密码 | The architectural layer within repoA that contains the targeted validation defect (accepting empty-string passwords). | A component contained within the repoA Node.js login application.

nodes.name: empty password validation
nodes.description: 针对空密码应在校验阶段被拒绝的预期行为，描述了该缺陷场景

nodes.name: deterministic probes
nodes.description: 验证流程中执行的三个确定性探测用例

nodes.name: regression tests
nodes.description: 包含定向测试以及完整回归套件的测试集合

nodes.name: H0 harness
nodes.description: Baseline harness level with minimal visibility, serving as the foundation of the harness ladder.

nodes.name: H1 harness
nodes.description: Tool-integration harness level that adds a tool registry, test-command registry, and tool-usage protocol on top of H0.

nodes.name: H2 harness
nodes.description: Context–memory harness level that adds project memory, task state, and a context-selection protocol on top of H1.

nodes.name: H3 harness
nodes.description: Observability–verification harness level that adds deterministic checks, bug reproduction, failure attribution, and a verification protocol on top of H2.

nodes.name: H0–H3 harness ladder
nodes.description: An ordered ablation framework of harnesses (H0 to H3) where each level adds one named class of runtime support and inherits all artifacts of lower levels; visibility is monotonic. | A controlled ablation framework where each level (H0–H3) adds one named class of runtime support, with monotonic visibility where each level inherits all artifacts of lower levels.

nodes.name: tool registry
nodes.description: Component introduced at H1 for managing available tools within the harness.

nodes.name: tool-usage protocol
nodes.description: Protocol introduced at H1 governing how tools are invoked and used.

nodes.name: task state
nodes.description: Component introduced at H2 for tracking the current task's state.

nodes.name: deterministic checks
nodes.description: Component introduced at H3 for performing repeatable verification checks.

nodes.name: bug reproduction
nodes.description: Capability introduced at H3 for reproducing identified bugs deterministically.

nodes.name: failure attribution
nodes.description: Component introduced at H3 for attributing failures to specific causes. | A core harness facet emphasized during flaky-test diagnosis to attribute test failures correctly.

nodes.name: C_model
nodes.description: In the capability equation P = f(C_model, C_harness, C_environment, T), C_model denotes the foundation model's latent capability.

nodes.name: C_harness
nodes.description: The runtime substrate that mediates between the foundation model and the software environment in the capability equation.

nodes.name: C_environment
nodes.description: What the software environment exposes to the agent in the capability equation.

nodes.name: task distribution
nodes.description: The variable T representing the task distribution in the capability equation P = f(C_model, C_harness, C_environment, T).

nodes.name: foundation model
nodes.description: The base latent-capability model (C_model) that the harness layer wraps and mediates access to. | Underlying model capable of generating correct code fragments and explaining existing functions, serving as the base ability for software engineering.

nodes.name: failure-attribution log
nodes.description: 记录观察到的输出、预期输出、失败类型、证据、替代解释以及下一步诊断操作的日志机制

nodes.name: harness gap
nodes.description: 智能体运行环境中需要人工干预弥补的不足或缺口

nodes.name: agent-introduced maintenance burden
nodes.description: 智能体在运行过程中引入的各类维护负担，涵盖代码、文档、依赖、测试、文件残留、架构、工作流等维度

nodes.name: diagnostic action
nodes.description: 在失败归因后计划执行的下一步诊断操作

nodes.name: alternative explanations
nodes.description: 对失败原因提出的替代性解释假设

nodes.name: Canonical Workflow (reproduce → attribute → fix → verify → report)
nodes.description: H3's structured workflow for debugging tasks, consisting of the sequential steps reproduce, attribute, fix, verify, and report.

nodes.name: Empty-password probe
nodes.description: A diagnostic probe run by H3 before editing, used to observe validation behavior such as distinguishing 'Invalid credentials.' from 'Password is required.' errors.

nodes.name: Reproduce Failure
nodes.description: H3 验证工作流的第一步：编辑前先复现失败

nodes.name: Classify Failure Type
nodes.description: H3 验证工作流的第二步：对失败类型进行分类

nodes.name: Attributed Layer Fix
nodes.description: H3 验证工作流的第三步：对归因层应用针对性修复

nodes.name: Behavior Verification
nodes.description: H3 验证工作流的第四步：验证必需行为与保留行为

nodes.name: Evidence Reporting
nodes.description: H3 验证工作流的第五步：报告证据与局限性

nodes.name: Verification checks
nodes.description: The evaluator's adjudication relies on three deterministic verification checks to assess hypothesis progression

nodes.name: evaluator's adjudication
nodes.description: The adjudication process by an evaluator that relies on three deterministic verification checks

nodes.name: H1-H3 Protocol
nodes.description: A hierarchical protocol structure where context traces appear at H2 and above, while reproduction logs, attribution logs, deterministic-check records, and verification reports appear only at H3.

nodes.name: Context Traces
nodes.description: Diagnostic artifacts surfaced at H2 and above within the H1-H3 protocol.

nodes.name: Attribution Logs
nodes.description: Diagnostic records at H3 level used to classify failure types and gather evidence.

nodes.name: Deterministic-Check Records
nodes.description: Diagnostic records at H3 level capturing deterministic verification checks.

nodes.name: Verification Reports
nodes.description: Diagnostic reports produced at H3 level as part of the verification discipline.

nodes.name: Reproduce-Attribute-Fix Loop
nodes.description: A three-step failure-handling workflow: reproduce the observed failure vs. expected, attribute by classifying failure type and evidence, and fix with a targeted edit.

nodes.name: Tool Instability
nodes.description: A runtime concern (not an incidental nuisance) that the H1-H3 packages and protocol explicitly surface rather than hide.

nodes.name: Full-Regression Timeout
nodes.description: A recorded runtime condition in H1-H3 packages that the protocol surfaces and H3 verification discipline accommodates.

nodes.name: Verification Discipline
nodes.description: The discipline at H3 that accommodates runtime issues such as tool instability and full-regression timeouts.

nodes.name: autonomous software engineering
nodes.description: The domain requiring runtime support (harness) and a capability distinct from mere code generation. | The research domain whose central question the framework reframes through auditable evaluation.

nodes.name: coding ability
nodes.description: The narrower capability of producing correct code fragments, contrasted with the broader software-engineering capability.

nodes.name: software-engineering capability
nodes.description: The broader capability that extends beyond code fragment generation to encompass autonomous software engineering activities.

nodes.name: AI Coding Agents
nodes.description: Autonomous software engineering agents that may run wrong tests, misinterpret failures, forget task state, leave behind obsolete artifacts, or declare success without sufficient verification.

nodes.name: Human Oversight
nodes.description: The role humans play in AI-assisted coding, providing runtime support such as identifying context, explaining repository structure, selecting tools, interpreting feedback, enforcing architectural boundaries, verifying behavior, and cleaning up residue.

nodes.name: Code Verification
nodes.description: The process of checking whether API behavior is correct, tests are appropriate, and claimed success is justified, primarily performed by humans in the discussed workflow.

nodes.name: Architectural Boundaries
nodes.description: Repository and system-level structural constraints that humans enforce to ensure AI coding agents operate within correct design limits.

nodes.name: prompt
nodes.description: 仅塑造单次模型调用（single model invocation）的输入结构，与 harness 作用于整个 episode 形成对照。

nodes.name: agent framework
nodes.description: 提供组合 agents 与 tools 的基础设施的研究对象（引用文献 [11, 12]），与 harness 在职责边界上不同。 | 智能体框架，用于组合智能体与工具的基础设施；与 harness 不同，它提供的是组合层面的基础设施。

nodes.name: model invocation
nodes.description: 单次模型调用行为，是 prompt 的作用粒度单位。

nodes.name: resource management
nodes.description: 本文借用的类比视角，将 harness 比作操作系统的资源管理机制以辅助理解。

nodes.name: Outcome adjudication
nodes.description: The evaluation process that applies deterministic checks, targeted login tests, lint, and bounded full-regression to assign outcome labels to every episode.

nodes.name: Deterministic checks
nodes.description: Rule-based verification checks applied at all levels during outcome adjudication.

nodes.name: Login tests
nodes.description: Targeted login functionality tests executed as part of outcome adjudication.

nodes.name: Full-regression
nodes.description: A bounded full-regression test attempt applied to every episode during outcome adjudication.

nodes.name: Empty Password Validation
nodes.description: 空密码验证行为，要求空密码产生包含 'Password is required.' 的验证错误信息

nodes.name: Regression Testing
nodes.description: 回归测试，确保现有有效登录和无效非空凭证行为在修改后保持不变

nodes.name: Valid Credentials
nodes.description: 有效凭证（alice / correct-password）应继续成功登录的行为要求

nodes.name: Invalid Credentials
nodes.description: 无效非空凭证应返回 'Invalid credentials.' 的行为要求

nodes.name: Attribution Log
nodes.description: 由 H3 引入的可审计诊断日志，评估者可据此审查智能体的诊断是否合理，再审视其补丁。

nodes.name: Random Patching
nodes.description: 当新编辑未能解决根本原因时所采用的随机修补策略，作为 H3 的对比基线。

nodes.name: Unsafe invalid episodes
nodes.description: 由权限边界缺失导致的不安全或无效的操作片段

nodes.name: Stale docs
nodes.description: 随 Agent 演进而过期的文档，是熵负担的典型表现之一

nodes.name: Dependency churn
nodes.description: 依赖项频繁变动带来的维护开销，熵审计器需要检测的对象

nodes.name: Residue
nodes.description: Agent 运行后遗留的代码或状态残留，熵审计的检测目标

nodes.name: False confidence
nodes.description: 因未验证成功而产生的错误自信，是缺失验证协议的典型后果

nodes.name: Human Intervention as Runtime Signal
nodes.description: A diagnostic signal used in agent evaluation, where human help during an episode is treated as informative rather than disallowed or treated as noise.

nodes.name: Harness Responsibility
nodes.description: Responsibilities within the harness layer of an agent system, such as recording evidence and recognizing premature completion, that map to failure modes when missing.

nodes.name: System as Unit of Analysis
nodes.description: An evaluation paradigm that treats the entire system (including human intervention) rather than the autonomous agent alone as the analytical unit.

nodes.name: Conventional Agent Evaluation
nodes.description: Traditional evaluation methodology where human help during an episode is either disallowed (to preserve autonomy) or treated as noise.

nodes.name: Premature Completion
nodes.description: A failure mode where an agent declares completion without recording evidence, recognizable to practitioners as a missing harness responsibility.

nodes.name: Failure-attribution log
nodes.description: 失败归因日志，关联失败信号（failure signal），同时依赖验证与模型层。

nodes.name: Outcome record
nodes.description: 结果记录组件，承载最终分类（final classification）与整体裁定（overall adjudication）。 | The record component that captures the final classification outcome and summary metrics of an evaluation episode.

nodes.name: tool budget
nodes.description: 智能体在一次执行中可调用的工具资源约束。

nodes.name: context budget
nodes.description: 上下文窗口或上下文管理的资源上限。

nodes.name: verification evidence
nodes.description: 用于支撑验证结论的证据集合。 | A critical runtime resource providing evidence that requirements have been satisfied during task execution.

nodes.name: agent operations
nodes.description: 智能体在回合内执行的操作动作序列。

nodes.name: The Ladder
nodes.description: A hierarchical verification system organized into levels (H2, H3, ...) that satisfies five design requirements (R1–R5).

nodes.name: Deterministic Behavioral Check Registry
nodes.description: A registry within H2 that records deterministic behavioral checks used for verification.

nodes.name: Bug-reproduction Protocol
nodes.description: A protocol within H2 used to reproduce identified bugs deterministically.

nodes.name: Failure-attribution Protocol
nodes.description: A protocol within H2 used to attribute observed failures to their root causes.

nodes.name: Evidentiary Completion
nodes.description: The principle, enforced by H3, that task completion is represented as an evidentiary object rather than an unsupported assertion.

nodes.name: R1 Controlled Visibility
nodes.description: Design requirement R1 of the ladder: each level exposes only its own assigned artifacts, and lower levels cannot see higher-level artifacts.

nodes.name: R2 Same Task Same Repository
nodes.description: Design requirement R2 of the ladder, ensuring comparability by fixing the task and repository context.

nodes.name: Login controller
nodes.description: A controller module under test that handles user authentication, invoked by the test probes with username/password inputs and returning JSON responses.

nodes.name: Node.js
nodes.description: JavaScript runtime used to execute short test invocations that require the login controller and print its JSON response. | Runtime environment used to execute short probe invocations that call the login controller. | The runtime platform on which repoA is implemented.

nodes.name: Invalid-login probe
nodes.description: Test probe using username='alice' and empty password, expecting the substring 'Password is required.' in the response.

nodes.name: Valid-login probe
nodes.description: Test probe using username='alice' and password='correct-password', expecting the substring 'ok':true in the response.

nodes.name: Invalid-non-empty-credentials probe
nodes.description: Test probe using username='alice' and password='wrong-password', expecting the substring 'Invalid credentials.' in the response.

nodes.name: AgentBench
nodes.description: Paper titled 'AgentBench: Evaluating LLMs as agents', published at ICLR 2024, authored by a large team including Xuanyu Lei, Hanyu Lai, Yu Gu, Hangliang Ding, Kaiwen Men, Kejuan Yang, Shudan Zhang, Xiang Deng, Aohan Zeng, Zhengxiao Du, Chenhui Zhang, Sheng Shen, Tianjun Zhang, Yu Su, Huan Sun, Minlie Huang, Yuxiao Dong, and Jie Tang.

nodes.name: LLM as agents
nodes.description: Concept of evaluating Large Language Models functioning as autonomous agents, which is the focus of the AgentBench benchmark.

nodes.name: agent maintenance burden taxonomy
nodes.description: A categorical scheme classifying agent-introduced maintenance burden into categories such as code, documentation, dependency, test, file residue, architecture, and workflow, each scored by severity from 0–3.

nodes.name: Outcome taxonomy
nodes.description: A taxonomy defining the five final outcome labels of an episode, including autonomous_verified_success and assisted_verified_success.

nodes.name: severity scoring
nodes.description: A 0–3 severity scale applied to each maintenance-burden category within an evaluation episode.

nodes.name: Model–Harness–Environment System
nodes.description: 由模型、Harness 与环境三者构成的系统整体，是 H3 视角下产生变更的基本单位。

nodes.name: Episode package
nodes.description: An auditable record produced by each episode, containing the full evaluation trace.

nodes.name: Input pack
nodes.description: The input bundle for an agent episode, composed of task specification, repository, and harness artifacts.

nodes.name: Agent episode
nodes.description: An episode executed by a model/agent within a harness, evaluated as the unit of evaluation rather than a single model response.

nodes.name: Outcome Adjudication
nodes.description: The evaluator-side process that applies deterministic checks, targeted login tests, lint, and a bounded full-regression attempt to every episode.

nodes.name: Bounded Full-regression
nodes.description: A limited-scope full regression test run included in the outcome adjudication pipeline.

nodes.name: H2 (Context–memory harness)
nodes.description: 上下文–记忆层 Harness，在 H1 基础上加入 agent 可读的项目记忆（架构、测试约定、已知失败）及任务（task）相关组件。

nodes.name: Agent-readable project memory
nodes.description: Agent 可读的项目记忆，涵盖架构、测试约定、已知失败等，由 H2 引入以供 Agent 读取的项目知识库。

nodes.name: API controller
nodes.description: One of the architectural layers contained in repoA, handling request routing. | A component contained within the repoA Node.js login application.

nodes.name: authentication service
nodes.description: One of the architectural layers contained in repoA, responsible for authentication logic. | A component contained within the repoA Node.js login application.

nodes.name: UI layer
nodes.description: One of the architectural layers contained in repoA, providing the user interface.

nodes.name: test suite
nodes.description: The pre-existing test suite included in repoA.

nodes.name: Runtime Substrate
nodes.description: The underlying execution infrastructure proposed in the paper to support foundation-model software agents.

nodes.name: Automated Code Generation
nodes.description: The task of automatically generating code, transformed by foundation models but still limited by agent reliability issues.

nodes.name: Hailin Zhong
nodes.description: Author of the paper, affiliated with Hong Kong Baptist University.

nodes.name: Shengxin Zhu
nodes.description: Corresponding author of the paper, affiliated with Beijing Normal University, Zhuhai.

nodes.name: Hong Kong Baptist University
nodes.description: Academic institution where author Hailin Zhong is affiliated.

nodes.name: Beijing Normal University
nodes.description: Academic institution (Zhuhai campus) where corresponding author Shengxin Zhu is affiliated.

nodes.name: Explicit runtime resources
nodes.description: Principle P1 stating that critical resources such as context, tool affordances, project memory, verification evidence, human attention, permission boundaries, and maintenance state must be exposed and named rather than left implicit.

nodes.name: Traceable mediation
nodes.description: Principle P2 stating that the harness must record how the agent selects context, invokes tools, attempts verification, recovers from failure, and incurs intervention.

nodes.name: Requirement-level verification
nodes.description: Principle P3 stating that task completion must be bound to evidence-based verification against requirements.

nodes.name: context
nodes.description: A critical runtime resource that must be explicitly exposed by the harness, representing the agent's operational context.

nodes.name: tool affordances
nodes.description: A critical runtime resource describing the tools available to the agent, which must be explicitly named rather than implicit.

nodes.name: Four-Level Ladder (H0-H3)
nodes.description: A mechanism within the harness that progressively exposes runtime support to the agent across four levels (H0-H3).

nodes.name: Trace-based Evaluation Protocol
nodes.description: A protocol that converts each agent run into an auditable episode package for evaluation.

nodes.name: Entropy Auditing
nodes.description: A component of the agent harness that audits the randomness or exploratory entropy of agent actions.

nodes.name: Intervention Recording
nodes.description: A component of the agent harness that logs human or system interventions during agent execution.

nodes.name: Permissions
nodes.description: A component of the agent harness that governs tool access and operational authority. | 软件工程活动中的权限控制机制，约束代理在开发环境中的操作范围。

nodes.name: Deterministic behavioral check registry
nodes.description: A component of the H3 harness providing deterministic behavioral checks for verification.

nodes.name: Figure 2
nodes.description: A figure in the source document that visualizes the H0–H3 harness ladder and the monotonic inheritance of artifacts across levels.

nodes.name: Harness Ladder
nodes.description: 一种受控消融（controlled-ablation）评测工具，旨在跨任务类别可复用的评测框架

nodes.name: Empirical Program
nodes.description: 一种以经验数据驱动而非终结性的研究程序，作为 Harness Ladder 的运行范式

nodes.name: Multi-task Evaluation
nodes.description: Harness Ladder 自然延伸方向之一，通过平衡任务套件对不同 Harness 组件施加压力

nodes.name: UI-behavior Tasks
nodes.description: 用于压力测试可观测性（Observability）的任务类别

nodes.name: foundation-model agents
nodes.description: Agents built on foundation models that require system-level management of context, tools, memory, verification, permissions, and other operational concerns.

nodes.name: Repository construction
nodes.description: The methodology used to build the experimental repository (repoA) to support hypothesis testing.

nodes.name: harness responsibility framework
nodes.description: 作者提出的框架，将智能体的各种失败模式映射到缺失的 harness 责任项

nodes.name: agent failure modes
nodes.description: 智能体的多种失败模式构成的一个失败族（family），包括写正确逻辑但检查错误文件、误读测试输出、打补丁到错误架构层、未验证先前行为、未记录证据等

nodes.name: Harness-Gap Label
nodes.description: A corresponding label paired with agent-introduced residue classification by the entropy audit.

nodes.name: Verification Harness
nodes.description: An integrated component within H3 that makes verification explicit, requiring the agent to check each requirement and report evidence and limitations.

nodes.name: Epistemic Discipline
nodes.description: A behavioral norm imposed on the agent by H3, requiring it to provide evidence for why changes are believed to be correct.

nodes.name: Human Review
nodes.description: External validation by humans, which becomes a dependency for agents that cannot self-verify behavior.

nodes.name: Transferable Record
nodes.description: An output of H3's verification process that documents why a change is believed to be correct.

nodes.name: verification_protocol
nodes.description: 用于评估代理补丁正确性与证据充分性的判定协议，涵盖多种成功与失败分类。

nodes.name: evaluator-side_checks
nodes.description: 评估端检查机制，用于判定任务行为是否通过，作为 unverified_success 的判定依据。

nodes.name: human_intervention
nodes.description: 在自主代理执行与验证过程中的人工介入行为，是区分 assisted 与 autonomous 成功状态的关键因素。

nodes.name: software environment
nodes.description: 提供仓库、测试、工具、日志与构建能力的基础软件环境。

nodes.name: Autonomous software-engineering capability
nodes.description: 自主软件工程能力，是组合系统的属性，而非单一模型的属性。 | 本文所提出的一种重新定义框架，旨在解决面向人类开发者的开发环境对智能体而言隐式、不可访问或不稳定的问题。

nodes.name: missing-harness human intervention
nodes.description: 当 AI Harness 缺少关键组件（如熵审计器）时所需的人工介入干预。

nodes.name: Software engineering
nodes.description: 一种长周期、有状态、工具中介、反馈驱动的活动，依赖上下文管理、项目记忆、工具接口、执行轨迹、验证信号、权限、回滚和维护纪律等支持。

nodes.name: Foundation model
nodes.description: 被部署到开发环境中的基础模型，作为智能体在软件工程活动中发挥作用。

nodes.name: Development environment
nodes.description: 主要为人类开发者设计的开发环境，当基础模型被置于其中时，许多支持对其而言仍是隐式、不可访问或不稳定的。 | 原本为人类开发者设计的开发环境，其中大量支持对智能体而言是隐式、不可访问或不稳定的。

nodes.name: Context management
nodes.description: 软件工程活动所依赖的关键支撑组件之一，用于管理长周期任务中的上下文信息。

nodes.name: Tool interfaces
nodes.description: 软件工程活动中代理与外部工具交互的接口，是工具中介性活动的核心支撑。

nodes.name: Execution traces
nodes.description: 软件工程活动中的执行轨迹记录，用于支持反馈驱动的活动循环。

nodes.name: Validation signals
nodes.description: 软件工程活动中的验证信号，用于驱动反馈循环和结果确认。

nodes.name: Rollback
nodes.description: 软件工程活动中的回滚机制，用于在错误操作后恢复状态。

nodes.name: Maintenance discipline
nodes.description: 软件工程活动中的维护纪律，是长周期有状态活动的支撑要素。

nodes.name: autonomous verified success rate
nodes.description: A process-level metric (abbreviated AVSR) enabled by the protocol to measure agent verification success.

nodes.name: missing-harness human intervention rate
nodes.description: A process-level metric (abbreviated M-HIR) enabled by the protocol to track human interventions in the absence of a harness.

nodes.name: context-trace meaningfulness
nodes.description: A process-level metric assessing the meaningfulness of the context traces produced during agent execution. | 上下文轨迹语义有意义性指标，衡量上下文追踪记录的可解释价值。

nodes.name: tool recovery rate
nodes.description: A process-level metric measuring how often an agent recovers from tool-related failures. | 工具恢复率指标，评估系统在工具调用失败后自我恢复的能力。

nodes.name: failure attribution completeness
nodes.description: A process-level metric measuring how completely failures are attributed to their root causes. | 失败归因完整性指标，衡量系统对失败原因定位和归因的完备程度。

nodes.name: evaluator-side adjudication
nodes.description: Checks that classify the final outcome at all levels, supporting the agent's own verification while preserving the ladder through consistent adjudication.

nodes.name: Repository state
nodes.description: 软件仓库在任务执行间的状态，在长时程评估中需要在任务之间保留。

nodes.name: Harness contributions
nodes.description: harness对系统输出的贡献，通过置信区间和假设检验进行统计估计。

nodes.name: Confidence intervals
nodes.description: 统计估计中用于harness贡献假设检验的置信区间。

nodes.name: full-regression
nodes.description: 完整的回归测试流程，其超时被记录而不会被静默重试或视为成功

nodes.name: timeout
nodes.description: 测试执行中的超时状态，会被显式记录而非静默处理

nodes.name: deterministic_requirement_coverage
nodes.description: 确定性需求覆盖，作为验证完整性的判定依据

nodes.name: verification_report
nodes.description: 记录验证过程中所有限制与状态的报告文档

nodes.name: isolated_workspace
nodes.description: Compute environment 中每个 episode 的隔离工作空间，仓库在该空间中以固定初始 commit 检出

nodes.name: compute_environment
nodes.description: 运行 agent 评估的总体计算环境，每个 episode 在独立的工作空间中执行

nodes.name: tool_invocations
nodes.description: 在隔离工作空间内由 agent 发起的工具调用

nodes.name: Software Engineering Agent
nodes.description: An AI agent capable of performing realistic software engineering tasks, encompassing repository navigation, context selection, tool use, test execution, failure interpretation, verification, documentation, and maintenance.

nodes.name: Code-Generation Benchmark
nodes.description: Isolated benchmarks used to evaluate code generation capability, commonly conflated with software-engineering agent competence despite measuring different things.

nodes.name: Software Engineering Process
nodes.description: A stateful process involving repository navigation, context selection, tool use, test execution, failure interpretation, verification, documentation, and maintenance.

nodes.name: Local Benchmark
nodes.description: Benchmarks used in isolation to measure model capability, shown to have a performance gap compared to realistic software tasks.

nodes.name: multi-model evaluation
nodes.description: Evaluation methodology examining how harness effects interact with varying model capabilities across different models.

nodes.name: flaky-test diagnosis
nodes.description: A task class that stresses failure attribution and recovery facets of the harness.

nodes.name: long-feature implementation
nodes.description: A task class that stresses task state and context management facets of the harness.

nodes.name: permission-sensitive tasks
nodes.description: A task class that stresses the permission boundary facet of the harness.

nodes.name: recovery
nodes.description: A core harness facet involved in recovering from flaky-test failures.

nodes.name: task state management
nodes.description: A core harness facet emphasized during long-feature implementation to manage multi-step task state.

nodes.name: context management
nodes.description: A core harness facet emphasized during long-feature implementation to handle accumulated context.

nodes.name: structured verification
nodes.description: A verification approach that some models may follow, interacting with harness behavior.

nodes.name: weaker model
nodes.description: 自动创建的临时节点

nodes.name: auditable episode package
nodes.description: An artifact produced from an agent run whose evidence structure (e.g., final patch, reproduction logs, failure attributions) varies with harness level.

nodes.name: harness level
nodes.description: A configuration dimension that systematically controls the evidence structure produced inside an episode package; lower levels yield only a final patch, higher levels yield reproduction logs, failure attributions, deterministic requirement checks, and structured verification reports.

nodes.name: final patch
nodes.description: The minimal evidence produced by lower harness levels in an episode package.

nodes.name: reproduction logs
nodes.description: Evidence produced at higher harness levels that allow an agent run to be replayed and verified.

nodes.name: failure attributions
nodes.description: Structured evidence produced at higher harness levels that localize the source of a failure.

nodes.name: deterministic requirement checks
nodes.description: Reproducible requirement-level assertions produced at higher harness levels.

nodes.name: structured verification reports
nodes.description: Aggregated verification summaries produced at higher harness levels.

nodes.name: controlled validation task
nodes.description: The benchmark task used to validate the framework and demonstrate its episode-package output. | 受控验证任务，文中作为框架应用举例的小规模设计任务，用于示范上述度量指标的使用。

nodes.name: Runtime Resources
nodes.description: AI Development Harness所管理的一组运行时资源的统称，类比传统操作系统管理的资源。

nodes.name: Project Resources
nodes.description: 运行时资源之一（内容被截断），属于AI Development Harness管理的资源类别。

nodes.name: Conventional Operating System
nodes.description: 传统操作系统，作为AI Development Harness资源管理类比的参照对象，但二者管理的资源类型有所不同。

nodes.name: AVSR
nodes.description: Verified Success Rate (AVSR)，用于评估系统成功率的总体层面度量指标。

nodes.name: entropy delta
nodes.description: 熵差指标，用于刻画系统在执行过程中不确定性变化。

nodes.name: Structured Contribution Field
nodes.description: A structured field format used to capture agent contributions, verified via the deterministic behavioral checks.

nodes.name: H3 Hierarchy Level
nodes.description: A higher tier of an agent evaluation/harness framework that mandates the failure-attribution log.

nodes.name: Entropy Auditor
nodes.description: A module responsible for detecting and managing code entropy (e.g., broken dependencies, weakened tests, debug scripts, inconsistent task notes, architecture violations) within the agent harness rather than outside the execution loop.

nodes.name: AI-Native Development Environments
nodes.description: Future software repositories and development environments designed natively for AI agents rather than human developers.

nodes.name: Entropy Management
nodes.description: The practice of preventing project degradation from code entropy; predicted to become as important as the immediate code change for autonomous software work.

nodes.name: task behavior
nodes.description: 分类法中的一个维度，描述任务本身的执行表现，例如补丁的正确性。 | 评估分类中区分的维度之一，指智能体在任务中产生的行为结果（如 patch、测试结果）。

nodes.name: evidence quality
nodes.description: 分类法中的一个维度，独立于任务行为，衡量证据（如诊断信息）的可靠性与可用性。 | 评估分类中区分的维度之一，指智能体所产出的证据是否足以支撑其行为符合协议要求。

nodes.name: deterministic behavioral checks
nodes.description: 协议依赖的确定性行为检查机制，通过可直接观察的输出将任务需求映射到验证结果。

nodes.name: validation task
nodes.description: 通过短命令验证已修复行为、有效输入保留行为和无效输入保留行为的任务类型。

nodes.name: taxonomy
nodes.description: 用于将任务行为与证据质量分离的分类体系，允许补丁正确但未验证，或失败但具有诊断价值。

nodes.name: Agentless
nodes.description: A paper on demystifying LLM-based software engineering agents, arXiv preprint arXiv:2407.01489, 2024. | LLM-based software engineering agents framework that demystifies the approach to automated software engineering tasks.

nodes.name: arXiv
nodes.description: An open-access preprint archive where Agentless was published as preprint arXiv:2407.01489.

nodes.name: Lingming Zhang
nodes.description: Co-author of the Agentless paper. | Researcher and co-author of the Agentless paper on LLM-based software engineering agents.

nodes.name: Human developers
nodes.description: 当前开发环境的主要设计目标用户，通过社交、文档与经验获取组件支持。

nodes.name: H0-H3 Harness Ladder
nodes.description: A controlled-visibility ablation that exposes progressively more runtime support to the agent, making the harness's contribution empirically separable.

nodes.name: Agent-Computer Interfaces
nodes.description: A related research area (referenced as [4]) from which AI Harness Engineering is distinguished.

nodes.name: Agent Operating Systems
nodes.description: A related research area (referenced as [13]) from which AI Harness Engineering is distinguished.

nodes.name: Coding Ability
nodes.description: 基础模型的代码能力，如生成正确代码片段、解释函数、为局部缺陷提出补丁等。

nodes.name: Software-Engineering Capability
nodes.description: 超越代码能力的有状态过程，涵盖仓库导航、上下文选择、工具使用、测试执行、失败解读、验证、文档与维护等。

nodes.name: Repository Navigation
nodes.description: 软件工程能力的关键组成之一，指在代码仓库中进行导航操作。

nodes.name: Context Selection
nodes.description: 软件工程能力的关键组成之一，指选择相关上下文信息的过程。 | The agent's behavior of selecting context, tracked by the harness.

nodes.name: Test Execution
nodes.description: 软件工程能力的关键组成之一，指执行测试用例验证代码正确性。

nodes.name: Failure Interpretation
nodes.description: 软件工程能力的关键组成之一，指对测试或执行失败进行解读分析。

nodes.name: Documentation
nodes.description: 软件工程能力的关键组成之一，指编写和维护项目文档。

nodes.name: Maintenance
nodes.description: 软件工程能力的关键组成之一，指对软件系统进行持续维护。

nodes.name: agent-computer interface
nodes.description: ACI，规定智能体如何通过工具进行交互，是 harness 的组成组件之一。

nodes.name: benchmark
nodes.description: A conventional benchmark that reports whether a final patch passes tests, considered useful but insufficient for studying agent harnesses.

nodes.name: Platform Engineering
nodes.description: Provides infrastructure for human and machine development workflows; explicitly distinguished from a development harness.

nodes.name: Foundation-model Agents
nodes.description: AI agents driven by foundation models that the development harness is designed to interface with at runtime.

nodes.name: DevOps tools
nodes.description: Tooling components that can be incorporated when building a development harness.

nodes.name: Software-development Environments
nodes.description: The execution environments (code, tools, files, systems) that a development harness mediates between agents and at runtime.

nodes.name: AIOS
nodes.description: 由 Kai Mei、Zelong Li、Shuyuan Xu、Ruosong Ye、Yingqiang Ge 和 Yongfeng Zhang 提出的 LLM 智能体操作系统（arXiv:2403.16971，2024）。

nodes.name: Yongfeng Zhang
nodes.description: AIOS 论文的作者之一（与 Kai Mei 等人合作）。

nodes.name: H0 – Minimal baseline
nodes.description: 最底层最小基线 harness，仅提供任务描述与仓库文件，不附加任何额外机制。

nodes.name: H1 – Tool harness
nodes.description: 在 H0 基础上引入工具能力，包含工具注册表、测试命令注册表与工具使用协议。

nodes.name: H2 – Context–memory harness
nodes.description: 在 H1 基础上增加上下文与记忆机制，包含项目记忆、任务状态与上下文选择协议。

nodes.name: H3 – Observability–verification harness
nodes.description: 在 H2 之上进一步加入可观测性与验证能力的 harness，用于测试时计算（test-time compute）。

nodes.name: Attribution before Recovery
nodes.description: P4 principle: a failed observation produces a classified diagnosis before the agent edits again.

nodes.name: Maintenance and Entropy Awareness
nodes.description: P5 principle: the harness records maintenance and entropy awareness for the agent system.

nodes.name: Tool Invocation
nodes.description: The agent's behavior of invoking tools, tracked by the harness.

nodes.name: Failure Recovery
nodes.description: The agent's behavior of recovering from failure, tracked by the harness.

nodes.name: Natural-language Assertion
nodes.description: An alternative to evidence-based verification where task completion is asserted in natural language.

nodes.name: Fcontext
nodes.description: 失败类型之一：智能体缺乏或误用了相关上下文。

nodes.name: Ftool
nodes.description: 失败类型之一：工具缺失、不稳定或被误用。

nodes.name: evaluator-side checks
nodes.description: 由评估方执行的检查机制，用于判定任务行为是否通过。

nodes.name: Deterministic behavioral checks
nodes.description: 确定性行为检查方法，用于在评估协议中判断智能体行为是否符合预期。

nodes.name: AutoCodeRover
nodes.description: Autonomous program improvement system for automated code fixing and software engineering tasks.

nodes.name: ICLR 2025
nodes.description: International Conference on Learning Representations 2025, a top-tier machine learning conference.

nodes.name: Abhik Roychoudhury
nodes.description: Researcher and co-author of the AutoCodeRover paper on autonomous program improvement.

nodes.name: 节点回滚
nodes.description: 允许用户通过点击已确认节点的修改按钮触发回滚操作，回滚前自动保存状态快照并支持一步撤销，LOCKED 节点不被回滚重置，属于 P1 阶段功能

nodes.name: 规划状态持久化
nodes.description: 将用户完整规划进度持久化存储，确保浏览器刷新或会话中断后可无缝恢复，保留历史状态快照支持回滚到任意历史节点，P1 阶段功能 | 功能11-4，将用户的完整规划进度持久化存储，确保浏览器刷新或会话中断后可以无缝恢复

nodes.name: 数据置信度标注
nodes.description: 横向支撑模块，对系统所有输出项统一标注数据来源和可靠性等级，标注覆盖率要求 100% 是验收硬指标 | 模块十二，横向支撑模块，2周工作量，P1阶段，对规划数据进行置信度标注。

nodes.name: 置信度分级标注
nodes.description: 为系统所有输出项标注统一的置信度等级，通过视觉差异化展示帮助用户快速判断信息可靠性 | 功能 12-1，为系统所有输出项标注统一的置信度等级，通过视觉差异化展示帮助用户快速判断信息可靠性

nodes.name: 状态快照
nodes.description: 回滚前及每次用户确认操作后自动保存的状态快照，用于支持一步撤销回滚和会话中断后的恢复 | 回滚前自动保存的状态记录，用于支持一步撤销回滚操作

nodes.name: LOCKED节点
nodes.description: 节点回滚过程中不被回滚重置的特殊节点，但触发时会展示兼容性警告 | 特殊状态节点，在影响域传播时跳过但在展示时给出兼容性警告，回滚时不被重置但展示兼容性警告

nodes.name: 置信度标注
nodes.description: 横向支撑模块，对系统所有输出项统一标注数据来源和可靠性等级，标注覆盖率要求 100%，是验收硬指标 | 包含分级标注与免责声明的输出可信度标记机制 | 包含分级标注（12-1）和免责声明（12-2）的核心组件

nodes.name: L1 实时数据
nodes.description: 置信度最高级别，数据来源于接口实时查询（30分钟内），前端以绿色展示并显示查询时间

nodes.name: L2 快照过期
nodes.description: 置信度等级，数据来源于接口查询但已超时效，前端以黄色警告展示并提示刷新

nodes.name: L3 统计数据
nodes.description: 置信度等级，数据来源于历史统计（如延误率等），前端以灰色展示并显示统计周期

nodes.name: L4 知识库
nodes.description: 置信度等级，数据来源于结构化知识库，前端以蓝色展示并显示更新日期

nodes.name: L5 模型估算
nodes.description: 置信度最低级别，数据来源于 LLM 内置知识，前端以橙色展示并固定提示'仅供参考，建议核实'

nodes.name: LLM 内置知识
nodes.description: 置信度标注体系中的数据来源之一，为 L5 模型估算级别提供依据

nodes.name: 只读分享链接
nodes.description: 功能 10-3，允许用户通过链接将行程单分享给同行伙伴或家人查看，被分享者只能浏览不能修改，链接有效期可配置。

nodes.name: 备选方案保留与一键替换
nodes.description: 功能 10-4，每个已确认主选节点（航班/酒店/景点）保留最多 2 个备选，支持一键替换主选并自动触发影响域传播。

nodes.name: 规划状态机
nodes.description: 模块十一，管理规划流程中每个节点的生命周期状态，支持状态流转、影响域传播和回滚操作，是所有业务模块协作运转的核心支撑层。 | 横向支撑模块，管理规划流程中每个节点的生命周期状态，支持状态流转、影响域传播和回滚操作，是所有业务模块协作运转的核心支撑层。 | 模块十一，横向支撑模块，4周工作量，P1阶段，跨模块的规划状态流转控制。

nodes.name: 节点状态管理
nodes.description: 功能 11-1，为每个规划节点维护标准化的生命周期状态。 | 功能 11-1，为每个规划节点维护标准化状态（PENDING、GENERATING、GENERATED、CONFIRMED、REJECTED、STALE、LOCKED），驱动规划流程按依赖顺序有序推进。

nodes.name: 影响域传播
nodes.description: 替换主选节点后系统自动处理下游影响，将受影响的下游节点标记为 STALE 的机制。 | 上游节点替换后自动触发的机制，将受影响的下游节点标记为 STALE 状态，保障规划数据一致性。 | 状态机中节点状态变化时自动传播到关联节点范围的机制 | 功能 11-2：用户修改已确认节点时，系统根据影响域表自动找出下游受影响节点并标记为 STALE，透明展示影响范围以防止规划数据出现静默不一致 | 当上游节点发生变更时，自动向受影响的下游节点传播重算的机制。 | 功能 11-2，用户修改已确认节点时，系统根据预定义影响域表自动找出所有受影响的下游节点并标记为 STALE，防止规划数据出现静默不一致 | 节点解锁后重新触发的下游变更传递机制，是行程编排中冲突检测与按天分配的基础 | 在系统设计阶段静态定义为查找表，运行时直接查表执行，决定变更（如行程变更、酒店变更、预算调整）所影响的已确认内容层级（L5行程、L6交通、L8费用等） | 状态机的核心机制（11-2），负责将状态变更传播到关联节点

nodes.name: STALE
nodes.description: 节点状态之一，表示下游节点受到上游主选替换影响后被标记的失效状态。 | 节点状态枚举值之一（需重算），表示上游变更导致当前方案过期，需重新计算。 | 上游变更导致当前方案过期的需重算状态 | 节点状态标记，用于标识因上游节点变更而可能失效的已确认内容

nodes.name: 回滚操作
nodes.description: 规划状态机支持的撤销/恢复机制，用于保障规划数据在整个会话中的一致性。

nodes.name: 功能 2-1 航班查询与候选方案生成
nodes.description: 调用真实航班 API，根据出发地、目的地、出行日期查询可选航班，按价格、时长、转机、准点率综合评分排序后生成推荐列表，并以卡片或表格形式展示。

nodes.name: 功能 2-2 航班价格快照标注
nodes.description: 为所有航班价格附带查询时间戳，超过 30 分钟未刷新自动标记"可能过期"并提示用户刷新，固定展示免责说明的价格快照功能。

nodes.name: Amadeus
nodes.description: 被功能 2-1 接入的真实航班查询 API 之一。

nodes.name: 携程开放平台
nodes.description: 被功能 2-1 接入的真实航班查询 API 之一。

nodes.name: 强制确认节点
nodes.description: 在基于意图约束查询真实航班数据生成候选方案后，要求用户必须明确操作不可跳过的确认机制，作为整个行程的时间轴锚点。

nodes.name: 综合评分维度
nodes.description: 航班候选方案排序依据：价格 40% + 飞行时长 25% + 转机次数 20% + 历史准点率 15%。

nodes.name: 价格快照
nodes.description: 航班价格在查询时刻的定格记录，附带时间戳以供用户判断时效性。

nodes.name: AGENT-TRAVEL-PRD-001
nodes.description: 旅行智能体PRD文档（v1.0），本文档的依据之一

nodes.name: AGENT-TRAVEL-REQ-001
nodes.description: 旅行智能体需求文档（v1.0），本文档的依据之一

nodes.name: PENDING
nodes.description: 节点状态枚举值之一（待生成），表示上游节点已固化，等待执行。 | 上游节点固化后等待执行的状态，下游节点在上游固化后自动被推入此状态

nodes.name: GENERATING
nodes.description: 节点状态枚举值之一（生成中），表示模块正在执行。 | 模块正在执行中的生成状态

nodes.name: GENERATED
nodes.description: 节点状态枚举值之一（已生成），表示候选方案就绪，等待用户确认。 | 候选方案就绪、等待用户确认的已生成状态

nodes.name: CONFIRMED
nodes.description: 节点状态枚举值之一（已确认），表示用户已确认，节点固化。 | 用户确认后节点固化的状态，会触发下游节点推入 PENDING

nodes.name: REJECTED
nodes.description: 节点状态枚举值之一（已否决），表示用户否决，待重新生成。 | 用户否决后等待重新生成的状态

nodes.name: LOCKED
nodes.description: 节点状态枚举值之一（手动锁定），表示用户锁定，不受上游变更影响。 | 用户手动锁定的状态，不受上游变更影响 | 节点状态标记，在影响域传播时被跳过处理，但仍向用户展示
